reviews.review_description: Reminds me of the old school Arkanoid game, but this being a more modern fun version. Good soundtracks too.

I haven't played it for long but I've always had a thing for tennis games and this solves my problem! I don't have much room to play and with this game I can even play seated 😎

I know it's a simple concept but I enjoy playing this and I can't wait to see what else they put into it, so far only seen the power ball.

Love this game extremely challenging and addictive best App Lab Game yet.. This is a game that will not disappoint very challenging but perfect mix of retro brick breaker, but  beautiful blend of the modern gameplay.
Lots of fun!

This is like the old Arkanoid game, which was always a favorite. I haven’t had it very long, but loving the continuing leveling up when playing alone. I actually purchased it and gifted it to friends as well to play together. It looks like there are various options on ways to play with friends. We chose to just try one to start. You each have your own bricks to break. And if you clear your stacks, you can send bricks to your opponent’s side, moving them forward and if they can’t clear them fast enough, you win. We are very competitive and played for a good while, got a decent little workout in while playing. Highly recommend this as even my friend who would rather play a sitting type of game really enjoyed playing.

The combination of breakout/arkanoid with racquetball makes for an engaging experience and often a good component to a workout.  AR mode does not work unfortunately.  Rather than simply turning on the cameras for the ability to see your real-life background behind the game as seems to be intended, it unfortunately seems to look for a pre-scanned "room" even if that's nowhere near where the player actually is :(  This leads to seeing the menu/game 50 to 100 feet away from my location.  Otherwise it'd be the perfect racquet game; for now I'm stuck using the VR mode though.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review and feedback. We are sorry you experienced issue with the AR mode. The issue could be that the there are multiple rooms setup in the Quest. To solve this, try the following:
Go into settings -> environment setup -> space setup. Delete existing room setups that are saved there. Setup a new one by scanning or manually setting up the walls in the room you want to play. Try the AR mode again in Cybrix. We hope this helps. 

If this doesn't solve the issue, you can also reach out to us via email: info@holonautic.com

reviews.review_description: Great game!
They need to add mixed reality to workout mode.

I would do the workout mode, but it is missing the mixed reality option.
It would also make sense to give options in the workout mode to block certain extras.
Loving the game so far, even the regular gameplay gives me a nice workout while its mixed reality mode provides confidence I am not punching things in the real world.

Love the game but the play space is wider than my boundary. If the ball goes to my side I have to reach out of my boundary to hit it, but then of course I can't see the ball anymore and just see my cat staring and silently judging me from my armchair

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review and feedback! If your play space was automatically created by the Meta Quest, we recommend clearing the area of obstacles like chairs to maximize your play area. For a more customized experience, you can also manually set up your play space by going into the settings of your Meta Quest. We hope this helps enhance your experience!

reviews.review_description:
If better physics, I would not return and rated 5 star.
But bad physics ruined it all.
It seems this complaint has been raised by several people in the review but the developer always (politely) refuse to improve accordingly.
Love this game, but want to play it with my wife at home. Will it ever get a colocation update?
When i start the game i get a blank screen and music.  Is anyone else having this problem?  If so is there a solution.  I have to reinstall the game in order to play it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for letting us know. This is a rare issue, please try to shut down (not only restart) the Meta Quest completely and start it up again in combination with uninstalling and reinstalling the game. Let us know, if this has already helped.

Cybrix VR game offers an immersive and exhilarating virtual reality experience that transports players to a futuristic world filled with stunning visuals and dynamic gameplay. The game's gripping narrative and engaging mechanics keep you hooked from start to finish.

I get more exercise than any other game. There is no fear of getting shot by enemies, just the addictive joy of smashing! Wish I tried it earlier than I did. Love it. No complaints, except for my sore arms

reviews.review_title: Really fun and a good workout
reviews.review_description: This game is easy to play and very fun. Graphics and sounds are solid. It starts easy enough but gets progressively harder as you go. Smashing a bunch of blocks when you get a power ball is very satisfying! It is slightly repetitive- maybe bonus stages can be added to break it up a bit? Regardless, it's good fun as is.

reviews.review_title: So fun n an awesome arcade
reviews.review_description:
It's like a mix between Tenis and Block breaker!! I love it! This games is awesome.
I enjoy a lot playing this game. 

Graphs: 100/10
Gameplay: 100/10
Fun: 100/10

It is everything you would expect a mashup of Racquetball and Breakout to be!  Very well done!  Just when I was thinking, "Man, it would be great if I could have a blaster in this game just like in Breakout" BAM, they give you a blaster to shoot the blocks while frantically returning the relentless ball.  Really enjoyed the "Power Ball" element as well forcing you to hit the ball harder.  Gave me a nice little workout that I wasn't expecting.  Most of all, it is fun!

I got to beta test for the game and see it improve over time, and trust me, this game is definitely addicting! It seems like just another throwaway VR game at a glance, but after you play the same level over and over for a better score and play through like 20 levels a day you realize that this game has a hold of you! The hectic gameplay and unique mechanics make each level, however similar, feel like a blast!

Definitely recommend!

It doesn't require a lot of strength to hit the ball hard, 
Without knowing it, I put a lot of strength into it and it becomes an exercise.
